# Ceritinib 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Ceritinib 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Ceritinib</strong> 目前有 <strong>26 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Ceritinib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Zykadia is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK) positive advanced non small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) previously treated with crizotinib.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>fibromatosis, gingival（99.9%）</li>
<li>fibroma of lung（99.8%）</li>
<li>hamartoma of lung（99.8%）</li>
<li>lung hilum carcinoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>lung benign neoplasm（99.8%）</li>
<li>pulmonary sulcus neoplasm（99.8%）</li>
<li>lung germ cell tumor（99.8%）</li>
<li>inclusion body myopathy with early-onset Paget disease with or without frontotemporal dementia（99.8%）</li>
<li>Leukomelanoderma-infantilism-intellectual disability-hypodontia-hypotrichosis syndrome（99.8%）</li>
<li>junctional epidermolysis bullosa（99.8%）</li>
<li>ovarioleukodystrophy（99.7%）</li>
<li>junctional epidermolysis bullosa, non-Herlitz type（99.7%）</li>
<li>lung cancer（99.7%）</li>
<li>dehydratase deficiency（99.7%）</li>
<li>Ewing sarcoma（98.8%）</li>
<li>amyotrohpic lateral sclerosis type 22（94.0%）</li>
<li>orbit sarcoma（93.9%）</li>
<li>synovial chondromatosis（93.9%）</li>
<li>ganglioneuroblastoma (disease)（93.5%）</li>
<li>giant cell tumor of soft tissue（93.4%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/ceritinib/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>

  background: #ff9800;
  color: white;
  padding: 2px 10px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  font-size: 0.85em;
  margin-left: 4px;
}
.news-drug-tag {
  display: inline-block;
  background: #1565c0;
  color: white;
  padding: 2px 10px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  font-size: 0.85em;
  margin-left: 4px;
}
</style>
